blocks.content: She moved her bag before I even asked. Not rushed — like she'd made the decision before I got there.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You're not going to let that go.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: So how do you know Jonathan Michaels?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: We grew up in the same neighborhood. Friends since middle school.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: I'm just saying mm. Mm is not a crime.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: Whether you're actually his friend or somebody who just travels with him.
Across the room Jonathan looked up, found me at Maya's table, and registered it without breaking his conversation. No nod. No reaction. Just — filed.

blocks.prompt: Keisha is still watching. Maya is pretending she isn't.

options.label: Turn back to Maya. Don't engage Keisha.
